title: Ambassador Mapping
description: Schema for an Ambassador Edge Stack Mapping custom resource that associates a URL prefix or path with a backend Kubernetes service for routing, load balancing, and traffic management.

apiVersion.description: API version for the Mapping resource

name.description: Name of the Mapping resource, unique within a namespace

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace the Mapping belongs to

labels.description: Key-value pairs for organizing and selecting Mapping resources

annotations.description: Key-value pairs for storing arbitrary non-identifying metadata

MappingSpec.description: Specification defining routing behavior for the Mapping

hostname.description: Hostname to match for this Mapping. Use '*' to match all hostnames.

prefix.description: URL prefix to match for routing requests to the backend service

prefix_regex.description: Whether the prefix should be interpreted as a regular expression

prefix_exact.description: Whether the prefix should be matched exactly rather than as a prefix

service.description: Target backend service to route to, in the format service-name.namespace:port or a full URL

rewrite.description: Prefix rewrite rule applied to the URL before forwarding to the backend service. Set to empty string to disable rewriting.

method.description: HTTP method to match. If omitted, all methods are matched.

method_regex.description: Whether the method value should be treated as a regular expression

headers.description: HTTP headers that must be present on the request for this Mapping to match

query_parameters.description: Query parameters that must be present for this Mapping to match

timeout_ms.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for this Mapping

idle_timeout_ms.description: Idle timeout for streaming connections in milliseconds

connect_timeout_ms.description: Upstream connection establishment timeout in milliseconds

weight.description: Weight for traffic splitting when multiple Mappings match the same prefix. Used in canary deployments.

bypass_auth.description: Whether to bypass the external authentication service for requests matching this Mapping

grpc.description: Whether the upstream service uses the gRPC protocol

circuit_breakers.description: Circuit breaker configurations for the upstream cluster

labels.description: Rate limiting labels to apply to requests matching this Mapping

add_request_headers.description: Headers to add to the request before forwarding to the upstream service

add_response_headers.description: Headers to add to the response before sending to the client

remove_request_headers.description: Header names to remove from the request

remove_response_headers.description: Header names to remove from the response

allow_upgrade.description: Protocols to allow upgrade to, such as websocket

enable_ipv4.description: Whether to enable IPv4 DNS lookups for the upstream service

enable_ipv6.description: Whether to enable IPv6 DNS lookups for the upstream service

ambassador_id.description: List of Ambassador IDs that should apply this Mapping, for partitioning a cluster among multiple Ambassador instances

MappingStatus.description: Status information reported by Ambassador for the Mapping

state.description: Current operational state of the Mapping

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the current state

CORSPolicy.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing configuration applied to requests matching this Mapping

methods.description: Allowed HTTP methods for CORS requests

headers.description: Allowed request headers for CORS requests

credentials.description: Whether to allow credentials (cookies, authorization headers)

exposed_headers.description: Response headers exposed to the browser

max_age.description: How long the preflight response can be cached in seconds

RetryPolicy.description: Retry configuration for failed requests to the upstream service

retry_on.description: Envoy retry condition specifying when retries should occur

CircuitBreaker.description: Circuit breaker configuration for protecting upstream services from overload

max_connections.description: Maximum number of connections to the upstream cluster

max_pending_requests.description: Maximum number of pending requests queued for the upstream cluster

max_requests.description: Maximum number of parallel requests to the upstream cluster

max_retries.description: Maximum number of parallel retries to the upstream cluster

LoadBalancer.description: Load balancing configuration for distributing traffic across upstream endpoints

cookie.description: Cookie-based session affinity configuration for ring_hash policy

name.description: Name of the session affinity cookie

header.description: Header name to use for hash-based load balancing

source_ip.description: Whether to use source IP for hash-based load balancing
